title: Currency: transaction to accounting currency conversion through the exchange-rate provider
instruction: In the sandbox model, convert amounts correctly across currencies. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="currency-exchange-rates"). Create a class DemoCurrencyConverter with public static methods: (1) `AmountMST toAccountingCurrency(AmountCur _amount, CurrencyCode _fromCurrency, TransDate _date)` - converts through the platform exchange-rate API (CurrencyExchangeHelper / ExchangeRateHelper as taught by the knowledge entry) for the legal entity's accounting currency on the given date; (2) `AmountCur convert(AmountCur _amount, CurrencyCode _from, CurrencyCode _to, TransDate _date)` - cross-currency conversion via the same helper; (3) `AmountCur roundToCurrency(AmountCur _amount, CurrencyCode _currency)` - rounds with the currency's own rounding rule from the Currency table, never with a hardcoded 0.01. Hand-multiplying by an ExchangeRate value read straight from the exchange-rate table FAILS this case. Confirm the helper class and member signatures with search/get_method before writing them - do not guess. The class must build with zero BP errors.
